description: Input schema for structure prediction tools (e.g., AlphaFold, ESMFold).

extra.description: Tool-specific parameters passed through to the container. Keys and values are forwarded as-is into config.json.
extra.title: Extra

sequences.description: Mapping of chain ID to amino acid sequence (e.g., {'A': 'MKLL...', 'B': 'GVSE...'}).
sequences.title: Sequences

num_models.description: Number of structure models to generate.
num_models.title: Num Models

templates.description: Paths to template structures (PDB or mmCIF) for template-based prediction.
templates.title: Templates

title: StructurePredictionInput
